tasks.n: The connector does a real chunk — sourcing matching Adobe Stock photos, cutting out subjects, and colour/tone-matching them to the reference. I don't have the stock photos—find workable photos. Print 24×36", 300 dpi, CMYK + web version. Need back: layered PSD with masks, print PDF, web JPG.
